title: ABB India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ABB India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? ABB India International Enterprises in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
